response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering (15+ years) and demonstrates strong technical versatility across languages and systems, including AI-agent infrastructure work. His entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective shows initiative, though it lacks a clear AI focus. He meets minimum qualifications but lacks advanced AI-related degrees or recognized expertise in AI products/platforms. His recent career gap may raise questions about current engagement with cutting-edge AI technologies.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, AI-agent infrastructure)
Entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective, demonstrating leadership and platform-building skills
Strong polyglot programming skills and engineering rigor (TDD, CI/CD, DevOps) with multiple languages including D, JavaScript, and TypeScript
concerns: Lacks advanced AI-related education (MS/PhD) or clear recognition as an AI expert with built products/platforms
Recent career gap (2025) may indicate reduced exposure to current AI/cloud technologies
AI experience is present but not a primary focus—recent AI work (MCP, agent infrastructure) is promising but not deeply strategic or productized

key_factors.factor: Recent career gap and focus areas
